title: CHIEF MINISTER ADDRESSES NITI AAYOG MEETING WITH NORTHEASTERN CHIEF MINISTERS AND CHIEF SECRETARIES
content:
172/2026-2027Aizawl, 12 June 2026 :A meeting between NITI Aayog and the Chief Ministers and Chief Secretaries of the Northeastern States was held today at the NITI Aayog Office in New Delhi.

During the meeting, Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma highlighted key concerns and priorities of the Government of Mizoram, as well as issues crucial for the accelerated development of the Northeast region.

The Chief Minister expressed his appreciation for the appointment of Dr. Joram Aniya, a representative from the Northeast, as a Member of NITI Aayog. He also welcomed the initiative of convening a dedicated meeting for the leaders of the Northeastern States.

The major points raised by the Chief Minister included:

Separate All India Service (AIS) Cadre for Mizoram :He emphasized the necessity and importance of establishing a separate AIS cadre for Mizoram. In this regard, he noted that discussions have also been held with Arunachal Pradesh Chief Minister Pema Khandu. He highlighted the benefits of having a separate cadre to support the State's development aspirations.

Peace City at Thenzawl : The Chief Minister briefed the meeting on the ongoing initiative to establish a Peace City at Thenzawl. Recalling his own journey—resigning from the Indian Police Service in response to Prime Minister Indira Gandhi's call for peace efforts, relinquishing his position as Member of Parliament, and the personal sacrifices he endured—he appealed for continued support and cooperation to realize the vision of the Peace City.

Northeast Economic Connectivity : As Convener of the High-Level Task Force on the Northeast Economic Corridor, he stressed the urgent need to expedite the completion of the India-Myanmar-Thailand (IMT) Trilateral Highway extending to Thailand. He also noted that the Kaladan Multi-Modal Transit Transport Project (KMMTTP) has experienced considerable delays and underscored the importance of completing it within a reasonable timeframe.

Review of Aspirational Districts and Blocks : He called for a review of the Aspirational Districts and Aspirational Blocks Programme in the Northeast, particularly in Mizoram. The Chief Minister observed that the current criteria do not adequately reflect the realities and challenges faced by hilly and border states.

Flexibility in Centrally Sponsored Schemes : Referring to the guidelines governing Centrally Sponsored Schemes, he pointed out that many of these guidelines are not fully suited to the unique conditions of the Northeast. He advocated for greater flexibility and necessary modifications to align them with the region's geographical and developmental realities.

Support for Mizoram Ginger Mission : The Chief Minister sought NITI Aayog's support for the expeditious establishment of ginger processing facilities under the Mizoram Ginger Mission.

Tourism and Sports Development : He highlighted various initiatives aimed at advancing Mizoram's tourism sector and briefed the meeting on the progress of the Empowering Mizoram Sports programme under the Sports Department, along with future plans for its expansion.

Utilisation of Gross Budgetary Support : He stated that the Central Government's provision of 10% Gross Budgetary Support for the Northeastern States has been highly beneficial. He further suggested that such funding should be provided with greater flexibility, enabling State Governments to utilise it for their own priority schemes and critical development projects.

During the meeting, NITI Aayog CEO Ms. Nidhi Chhibber welcomed the participants, while Vice Chairman Mr. Ashok Kumar Lahiri delivered the keynote address of the meeting.

title: DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER, AIZAWL DISTRICT “PRESS MEET”
content:
995/2026-2027

AIZAWL; 12thJune,2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan  Er. Lalhriatpuia, District Election Officer, Aizawl District chuan  DC Pisa Pui Hall-ahSpecial Intensive Revision(SIR),2026kalpui mek chungchangah Press Meet kovin, chanchin thehdarhtute nen an inkawm.

Er. Lalhriatpuia chuan SIR-in a tum ber chu voter ni tlak India khua leh tui dik tak chu pakhat mah Electoral Roll a chuan tir hmaih loh leh, voter ni theilote chu Electoral Roll a chuantir palh loh a ni, tiin, SIR hi India Constitution Article 324 leh Section 21, Representation of the People Act, 1950 leh Registration of Electors Rules, 1960 ten thuneihna an pek angin Election Commission of India chuan a kalpui a ni a. Mizoramah pawh May 20 atang khan chak taka kalpui tan niin,  June ni 28 thlenga kalpui tur a ni.

SIR, 2026-ah hian ECI thu angin Electoral Roll thar siam a ni dawn a. Electoral Roll-a hming awmsa zawng zawng leh voter ni thei zawng zawngte chuan Enumeration Form hmangin registration dil thar vek tur a ni, a ti.

Er. Lalhriatpuia chuan Aizawl District mipui te hnenah ngenna siamin, Aizawl District chhunga cheng te chu Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026 chhung hian a hun takah leh dik takin Enumeration Form te buaipui theuh tur in kan in ngen a, BLO leh election lama hnathawk dangte chu tha taka lo tawiawm turin ka sawm duh che u a ni. Electoral Roll dik tak kan neih theih nan theihtawp chhuah turin ka sawm vek che u a. Democracy chak zawk leh dik tak, electoral roll felfai kan neih nan kan pawimawh em em vek a ni tih I hre thar ang u, a ti.

Media-te Hnenah pawh ngenna siamin, Pu Hriatpuia chuan SIR 2026 chungchang hriattirna theh darh te, mipuite hnena SIR chungchang zirtirna kawngah District Election Officer's Office atanga thuchhuah pawimawh heng: SIR hunbi, kalphung, voter tling thei leh theilote leh ni pawhmawhte hi uluk taka mipuite hnena min puanzar sak thin turin ka ngen che u a. SIR chungchangah thudik tawklo emaw thu hriatfuh tawk loh avanga buaina awm thei te anih avangin chutiang hun a lo thleng palh anih chuan thu chiang zawk District Election Officer's Office, Aizawl-ah zawt fiah hmasa zel turin ka ngen takmeuh che u a ni. Thu diklo leh belhchian dawllo te tihdarh palh anih loh nan leh mipuite kan lo fimkhur zawk nan hetiang lam zawhna awm reng reng chu District Election Officer's Office ah leh Electoral Registration Officer's Office tinah Helpdesk kan siamah te leh Election Office, Aizawlah te zawhfiah theih reng a ni, a ti.

SIR a Voter inziak lut tura chuan heng mite hi an ni tur a ni :

1. India khua leh tui dik tak a ni tur a ni.

2. Qualifying Date (01.07.2026)-ah kum 18 a tling tawh tur a ni.

3. Assembly Constituency-a cheng (ordinarily resident) a ni tur a ni.

4. Parliament-in dan a siam anga voter ni thei ngei a ni tur a ni, tiin Pu Hriatpuia a chuan a tarlang bawk.

title: Home Minister Inaugurates Serkhan Police Outpost; Visits Mualkhang Gas Bottling Plant
content:
171/2026-2027Dated Serkhan, 12 June 2026:Mizoram Home Minister Shri K. Sapdanga today inaugurated the newly established Serkhan Police Outpost, a significant development aimed at strengthening law and order and enhancing public safety for the residents of Serkhan and its surrounding areas.

The Home Minister, addressing the gathering at the inauguration ceremony, stated that the Serkhan Police Outpost would play an important role in maintaining peace and security in the locality. He noted that despite the acute shortage of manpower, the Government had made concerted efforts to establish the outpost. He further stated that after dedicating the year 2025 as a year for promoting ‘Fitness’ within the Mizoram Police, the year 2026 is being observed as a year of ‘Discipline’. Sustainable progress, he said, requires the elimination of misunderstandings and the strengthening of mutual trust and cooperation. He also stressed the importance of transparency and integrity in policing and underscored the need to place greater emphasis on the health and well-being of police personnel.

Shri K. Sapdanga described the Police Outpost as an important institution that would serve both as an agency for enforcing laws and regulations and as a vital point of interaction between the police and the public. He encouraged the personnel posted at the outpost to carry out their duties with dedication, humility and a strong sense of public service so as to inspire confidence among the people.

The Home Minister further highlighted the successful collaboration between police personnel and voluntary organisations in combating drug trafficking across the state. He also referred to ongoing efforts to curb the illegal smuggling of areca nuts and expressed confidence that the Serkhan Police Outpost would become an effective instrument in strengthening such initiatives.

Shri K. Sapdanga was accorded a ceremonial Guard of Honour. This was followed by the unveiling of the inauguration plaque of the Police Outpost and the ribbon-cutting ceremony.

Presenting a report on the establishment of the outpost, Shri H. Ramthlengliana, IGP (Hqrs), stated that the proposal for setting up a Police Outpost at Serkhan was first submitted in December 2020. Following a detailed assessment conducted by the Superintendent of Police, Kolasib, on 14 January 2021, a comprehensive report recommending the establishment of the outpost and outlining its necessity and utility was submitted. After completion of all necessary formalities, including identification of a suitable site, the Government of Mizoram issued a notification in February 2026 approving the establishment of the Serkhan Police Outpost.

The outpost will initially be staffed by five personnel comprising one Sub-Inspector, two Head Constables, one Constable and one Driver. It will cater to six villages namely: Serkhan, Lungdai, Lungmuat, Nisapui, Bukpui and North Chaltlang.

During the programme, Shri C. Lalzahngoa, DIG (Northern Range), delivered a welcome address, while Shri Lalrinpuia Varte, Superintendent of Police, Kolasib, proposed the vote of thanks.

Following the inauguration, the Home Minister visited Mualkhang Gas Bottling Plant. He expressed satisfaction over the ongoing upgradation of the facility, which is expected to improve the availability and accessibility of domestic LPG in the state. He also expressed hope that the upgraded plant would help address the recurring shortage of LPG cylinders.

During the visit, Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs Minister Shri B. Lalchhanzova informed that plans are underway to introduce a Pipeline Natural Gas (PNG) network that would serve Aizawl city and Mamit district. He stated that if the project progresses as planned, the pipeline is expected to reach Sihhmui by 2027.

The Minister further stated that upon completion of the expansion works at the Mualkhang Gas Bottling Plant, the facility is expected to handle approximately 7,500 LPG cylinders per day, significantly improving the supply of domestic cooking gas to consumers.

According to Shri Z. Lhungdim, Deputy General Manager, Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL), about 90 per cent of the boundary fencing and retaining wall construction has already been completed, while land development works have reached approximately 75 per cent completion. These works are expected to be completed by 21 July 2026.

Upon completion of the ongoing civil works, installation of the Mounted Storage Vessel (MSV) will commence. As per the project plan, the upgraded facility will have a storage capacity of 900 metric tonnes and will be capable of handling around 7,500 LPG cylinders daily. A 6,000 KL water reservoir for fire safety purposes will also be constructed. The expanded facility is expected to require approximately 50 employees, including contractual staff.

The Home Minister was accompanied by Shri Lalfamkima, Deputy Speaker; Shri B. Lalchhanzova, Minister of Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs; Shri Sharad Agarwal, Director General of Police; Shri Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA; Lt. Col. Pu Clement Lalhmingthanga, MLA; Shri T. Lalhlimpuia, MLA; Shri K. Laldawngliana, MLA; Shri Jeje Lalpekhlua, MLA; Shri H. Dolianbuaia, Deputy Commissioner, Kolasib  and Shri P.C. Lalduhthlanga Joint Secretary, Home Department. Village Council leaders, members of the Young Mizo Association (YMA), and the Mizo Hmeichhe Insuihkhawm Pawl (MHIP) were also present.

title: SECRETARY, DISTRICT COUNCIL & MINORITY AFFAIRS, GOVT. OF MIZORAM CONDUCTS SPOT VERIFICATION OF LADC & CADC BOUNDARY AT PARVA
content:
170/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 12th June, 2026:A spot verification was conducted today under the leadership of Pu Lalhmunsanga Punte, Secretary, District Council & Minority Affairs (DC&MA), Government of Mizoram, to examine issues relating to the boundary between the Lai Autonomous District Council (LADC) and Chakma Autonomous District Council (CADC).

The verification was carried out at Parva-I area (near Tuichawng), where issues concerning the placement of boundary stones by CYLA members were examined. The team interacted with Parva-I VC and YCA, Parva-II VC and YLA, and Parva-III YMA representatives, and held discussions regarding the status of the boundary and related matters.

Lawngtlai Deputy Commissioner Shri  Donny Lalruatsanga also attended the boundary inspection and interacted with the representatives of Parva I, II & III VCs and local voluntary organisations. The groups submitted their grievances and various community-related requirements, and the Deputy Commissioner assured that the matters would be looked into appropriately.

During the verification visit, Shri  Joseph Lalrinawma, Addl. Secretary, DC&MA; Shri  V. Zaithanmawia, Joint Secretary, DC&MA; Executive Secretaries of LADC & CADC; DLAO, LADC; and SDCs were also present.

title: DSW&RO leh MESL Lunglei ṭang kawpin War Memorial Lungleiah Green Mizoram Day pualin thing an phun
content:
988/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 12 :District Sainik Welfare & Resettlement Office (DSW&RO), Lunglei leh Mizoram Ex-Services League (MESL), Sub-Headquarters Lunglei ṭang kawp chuan nimin, June ni 11, 2026 khan Green Mizoram Day pualin War Memorial Lungleiah thing an phun a. Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann pawhin War Memorial-ah hian Green Mizoram Day pualin thing a phun bawk.

Sainik Welfare Lungleia thawktute leh Ex-Servicemen member-te hian Lunglei War Memorial chei thar hmunah Green Mizoram Day pual hian hun hmangin, ram tana nunna hlu tak lo hlan tawhtute hriat rengna lungphun hmunhma an tihfai bakah, thing ṭiak eng emaw zat an phun a ni.

War Memorial hmuna Green Mizoram Day pual thing phunnaah hian Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan telpuiin, sipai bangte kiangah thing ṭiak a phun a. War Memorial-a thing phun chu mi huaisen kal tate hriat rengna bakah, chhuan lo awm zel turte tana environment humhalh pawimawhzia tar langtu leh entawn tur hnutchhiahtu ni se a duh thu a sawi.

Lunglei DSW&RO Major Rebecca L. Chhakchhuak chuan sipai leh sipai bangte thinlungah War Memorial chuan hlutna thuk tak a neih thu sawiin, chengrang an lo chawipui tawh, rorum tak takte huaisenna leh inhlanna  chu an hlut hle tih a sawi a. Green Mizoram Day-a War Memorial hmun ngeia thing an phun chuan ram puma sipai martar chhungte leh ṭhiante inunauna a lantir tih a sawi a. Thing phun chu Green Mizoram Day puala thil tih ringawt ni lovin, War Memorial hlutna leh mawina tihpun bakah, ram tana eng kim hlantute hriat rengna nung awmtir chu a tum pakhat a nih thu a sawi.

title: Kawrthah Forest Division hnuaiah Forest dan leh hrai zirhona hun hman a ni
content:
987/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 12th of June, 2026 :Vawiin khan Luimawi khua-ah Pu Karthikeyan V, DFO Kawrthah hovin Kawrthah Forest Division chuan a tum 4-na atan "Kan ramngaw kan nunna" tih leh "Kan ramngaw hi kan nun khawchhuahna a ni" tih thupuia hmangin forest dan leh hrai te inhriattirna hun hman a ni.

Pu Karthikeyan V, chuan Forest (Reserve Forest) chhunga cheng khaw mipuite'n dikna chanvo leh mawhphurnate mipuite hnenah a hrilhfiah a. Tut-Langkaih Protected Council Reserved Forest leh Riverine Reserve Forest chungchangte sawifiahna te a nei a ni.

Vawiin programme-in a tum ber chu forest ram chhunga cheng khaw mipui te'n forest kaihhnawih dan an hriat te, an dikna leh mawhphurhna hriattir te leh mihringte leh ramngaw inkara inkungkaihna tha tak a awm zel theihna tura hmalak te a ni. Luimawi khaw mipuite chu an khaw chhehvelah department plantation thahnem tak a awm avangin a venhim kawngah khaw mipui te'n mawhphurhna pawimawh tak an neih thu hrilhin, Luimawi khua chu Luipui bula khaw awm an nih avangin Balu leh minor forest produce hrang hrangte hman leh lak dan chungchangte a hrilhfiah an ni bawk. Forest produce te venhim leh enkawl kawnga Department te thlawp tlat tura chahin, thawhhona tha tak neih zel an duh thu tarlan a ni.

Khawthlang mipuite atangin Forest Department chunga an lungawihlohna leh harsatna an tawhte ngaihthlak a ni a, inhrilhfiah ngaite hrilhfiah a ni bawk. He hunah hian Luimawi khaw VC member te, YMA, MHIP leh MUP member te an kal tha hle a ni.

title: NITI AAYOG LEH HMARCHHAK CHIEF MINISTER LEH CHIEF SECRETARY TEN INKAWMHONA NEI. MIZORAM CHIEF MINISTER-IN THUSAWI
content:
986/2026-2027

Aizawl the 12th June 2026:Vawiin khan NITI Aayog leh hmarchhak Chief Minister leh Chief Secretary ten NITI Aayog office, New Delhi-ah inkawmhona an nei a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan Mizoram sorkar mamawhte leh hmarchhak bialin chak zawka hma a sawnna tur thilte a thlen.

Chief Minister chuan, NITI Aayog member atana hmarchhak mi Dr. Joram Aniya ruat a nih avangin lawmthu a sawi a. Tin zawn neia hmarchhak state hruaitute tana meeting an buatsaih chu tha a tih thu a tarlang.

A thusawi tlangpuite chu:

1. Mizoram tana 'All India Service (AIS)' Cadre hran neih a tul thu leh a pawimawhzia a thlen a. Hemi chungchangah hian Arunachal Pradesh Chief Minister Pema Khandu nen pawh hma an la dun a. State hmasawnna atana cadre hrang neih a tulzia leh a hlawkna tur hrang hrangte he meeting-ah hian an sawi lang a ni.

2. Thenzawla Peace City din tura hmalak mekna a tarlang a. Prime Minister Indira Gandhi ngenna avanga remna hna thawk tura Police hna a bansan thu te, MP nihna chawlhsan thu leh mimal taka a lo tawrh ve na te hriatsak chunga Peace City hmasawn zelna tura theihtawp chhuahpui zel turin a ngen.

3. High Level Task Force on Northeast Economic Corridor-a Convener a nihna angin Thailand thlenga kal tur India-Myanmar-Thailand (IMT) Trilateral Highway chu tihhlawhtlin vat a tul thu a sawi a. Kaladan Multi Modal Transit Transport Project (KMMTTP) pawh ti khawmuang tawh lo a, a hun taka zawh ngei tha a tih thu a sawi.

4. Aspirational Districts and Aspirational Blocks Programme hnuaia Hmarchhak bial, a bikin Mizoram chhunga a huam chinte ennawn a tul thu a tarlang a. Tuna hman mek tehfung (criteria) te hian tlangram leh ramri hrula awm State-te dinhmun dik tak a pho chhuak tawk lo tih a sawi lang a ni.

5. Centrally Sponsored Schemes kaihhruaina (guideline) chungchang sawiin heng central kaihhruainate hi Northeast-ah a nih ang anga hman rem lo tam tak a awm a, kan tlangram mila siamrem leh herrem a tul thu a tarlang a ni.

6. Mizoram Ginger Mission hnuaia sawhthing sawngbawlna din tur te tihhlawhtlin vat a nih theihna turin NITI Aayog puihna a ngen.

7. Tourism lama kan hmasawnna tur hrang hrang bakah Sports Department hnuaia Empowering Mizoram Sports kalpui mek a nih dan leh hmasawn leh zelna tur kawng hrang hrangte a tarlang.

8. Hmarchhak States te tana 10% Gross Budgetary Support sawrkar laipuiin a duan chu a tangkai hle a. Hemi hnuaiah hian funding hi a nihna ang taka state te pek a, state sawrkarin scheme a duan te leh hmasawnna hna pawimawh bikte thawh nana hman theih tura siam a tul thu a tarlang bawk a ni.

Inkawmhonaah hian NITI Aayog CEO Pi Nidhi Chhibber chuan kal khawmte lawmna thu a sawi a, Vice Chairman Ashok Kumar Lahiri chuan inkawmna an buatsaih chhan leh an ngaipawimawh thilte tarlanna a nei a ni.

title: Minister Pi Lalrinpuii’n Online National Drug Licensing System (ONDLS) leh FDA Integrated Reporting & Monitoring System (FIRMS) a tlangzarh
content:
984/2026-2027

Aizawl, 12 June 2026:Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan vawiin khan Mizoram Sorkar, Health & Family Welfare Department hnuaia drug license, cosmetic license leh medical device registration chi hrang hrang pekchhuahna tur National Digital Platform-Online National Drug Licensing System (ONDLS) leh FDA Integrated Reporting & Monitoring System (FIRMS) Mizorama hman theih turin a tlangzarh.

Minister chuan Mizote chu thil thiam chak tak kan nih thu a sawi a; he portal thar hian 'Ease of Doing Business' kawngah min pui a beisei thu a sawi bawk. Mizoram chu ram pumah 'most digitized state' ni tura kan Chief Minister-in hma a lak nasat thu tarlangin, Health Department pawhin online-in hna a kalpui nasa a; chung zingah chuan, MUHCS hnuaia online registration kalpui mek pawh a tel a, thawktute leh a hmangtute tan hna a awlsam phah thu a sawi. He portal-te hi mipuite leh thawktute'n ṭangkai taka an hman a beisei a; Sorkar, Pharmacist, leh Druggist-te thawhhona tha a pawimawh hle a ni, a ti.

ONDLS hi Government of India, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare-in Digital India Vision tihhlawhtlinna tura a kalpui mek a ni a, Central Drugs Standard Control Organization (CDSCO) leh Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (CDAC) te tangkawpin Central leh State/Union Territory Drug Control Authority zawng zawngte hman tura buatsaih a ni. Damdawi, Cosmetics leh Medical Device-te hi Drugs & Cosmetics Act, 1940 leh Rules, 1945 hnuaia licence nei thlapa siam emaw zawrh theih an ni ; technology hmasawn zel karah, India ram puma damdawi licence pekna leh enkawlna chu system pakhat hnuaia felfai leh inang tlang taka kalpui a nih theih nan ONDLS hi duanchhuah a ni.

ONDLS hi CDSCO, Ministry of HFW chuan state tinte hmang tura tiin, state thenkhat Online system dang hmangte pawh ONDLS-a inchhung khawm turin a ti bawk. Mizoram FDA pawhin ONDLS hman tumin, Health Department-in sawrkar leh mipuite tana a thatna leh hlawk zawkna tur kawng hrang hrang a zirchian hnuah ONDLS chu Mizorama hman theih turin Notification May 22, 2026 khan a chhuah ta a ni.ONDLS hnuaia kalpui turte chu heng service hrang hrang – Drugs Manufacturing license, Cosmetics Manufacturing license, Retail license, Wholesale license, Blood Centre license, WHO GMP Certificate of Pharmaceutical Product (COPP) te hi an ni.

FDA Integrated Reporting & Monitoring System (FIRMS)-ah hian thil pahnih a awm a, pakhat chu FDA Officer-ten Monthly Report an pekna tur a ni a, pakhat dang leh chu damdawi ruih theih khuahkhirh ngai zual lakluh leh hralh vil zuina tur a ni. Damdawi zingah hian ruih nana hman sual theih tam tak a awm a, chung damdawite chu doctor chawh chauhva hralh tur (Prescription drugs) an nih laiin, doctor chawh lohva hralh ral a tam hle a. Heng damdawite hi Mizorama lakluh khap ngawt a rem si loh avangin, hmansualna tur ven nan leh vilzui nana tih a ni.

title: Lungleiah ni 125 inhlawhna tur VB-G RAM G chungchang inhrilhfiahna hun buatsaih a ni
content:
983/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 12:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Lungleiah Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA) Scheme thlakna tur Viksit Bharat—Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) VB–G RAM G chungchang inhrilhfiahna hun, "Orientation Programme" buatsaih a ni. Lunglei District chhunga Head of Office-te leh Rural Development hnuaia Block Development Officer (BDO) leh staff eng emaw zat telin, BDO a hmuna kal lote pawhin biakhmuhtheihna (video conference) kal tlangin an chhim bawk.

He hun hi Lunglei District Bawrhsap (Deputy Commissioner) Pi Navneet Mann chuan hmanpuiin, scheme hrang hrangte hlawhtlinna tura theih tawp chhuah tlang tur leh department hrang hrang inkara thawh hona ṭha vawng zel turin kal khawmte a chah a. Department hrang hrang inkara hna thawh dan inhriatpui a, inlaichinna leh inpawhna ṭha neih chu scheme hlawhtlinna atan leh mipuite'n a nih dan tur taka scheme an chhawr ṭangkai theih nan a pawimawh thu a sawi.

Lunglei District Rural Development Office (DRDO) Project Director Pi Zoramdini chuan inlawmna thu sawiin, MGNREGA chu kum 20 dawn lai hman a nih hnuah tihtawp mai tur a nih tawh thu leh July 2026 aṭangin a thlakna tur VB–G RAM G chu hman a nih dawn thu a sawi a. He scheme thar hi India indan kum 100 tlin hriat rengna tura sawrkar ruahmanna Viksit Bharat Vision 2047 tihlawhtling tura buatsaih a nih thu a sawi.

DRDO Works Manager Pu Ramnunsanga chuan MGNREGA leh VB–G RAM G danglamna hrang hrang pawimawh zualte Powerpoint Presentation hmangin a sawi fiah a. MGNREGA chu ni 100 inhlawhna a nih laiin, VB–G RAM G-ah chuan ni 125 inhlawh a ni tawh dawn tih sawiin, hna thawh theih (permissible works) zat pawh 266 aṭanga 318-a tihsan a nih thu a sawi a. Tuna MGNREGA inhlawhna rate ₹281 chu tihsan a nih dawn thu leh he scheme atan hian North East state bikah Central leh State-in suk (fund) 90% leh 10%-a an intum sem tur thu a sawi bawk.

DRDO MIS Nodal Officer Pi HK Lalrintluangi chuan MGNREGA/VB–G RAM G scheme kalpui dan tura online system hmanga hna thawh dan kalhmang tlangpui a sawi fiah a. Zawhna leh chhanna leh sawi hona hun hman a ni bawk.

title: SERCHHIP AH INTEGRATED TRIBAL DEVELOPMENT PROGRAMME HAWNNA HUN HMAN A NI
content:
982/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 12thJune 2026:Vawiin khan Integrated Tribal Development Programme, Serchhip leh E.Lungdar Block-a kalpui tur hawnna hun Serchhip DC Pisapui Hall-ah hman a ni a, Dr. KC Lalmalsawmzauva, Advisor to CM (Implementation of Handholding Policy) chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian chuan thusawiin Mizoram sawrkarin a kalpui mek Bana kaih hi a thlawna sem tawp nilovin project base zela hmalak a ni a, engtia kalpui nge kan tum tih hi ngun taka ngaihtuah thin tur a ni, a ti. India rama district 802 zinga ziak leh chhiar thiam tamna ber an nih avangin vawiina kalkhawm kut hnathawktute lakah hian beiseina sang tak an neih thu sawi a ni. Sum hi hmasawnna nena kalkawpah kan ngai thin a, sum ngah ringawt hi hmasawnna a ni ber lo a, hmasawnna chu rilru lam thil a ni a ti a ni. Engkim hi taimaknain a hrinchhuah a ni a, keimahni theuhin kan zir a ngai a ni, a ti a. Progress Partner atana thlangtute kan fair a, a dawngtute pawh in fair kan beisei  a ni, a ti bawk.

Pi Lalchhuansangi, Project Director, ATMA Serchhip District chuan inlawmna leh Project kalpui dan tur leh hmalak dan tur tlangpui a sawi a. NABARD Tribal Development Fund leh Mizoram CM Bana Kaih Scheme tangkawpa kalpui tur a ni a, Implementing Agency chu ATMA Serchhip District a nih thu a sawi. Project hi kum 6 chhung kalpui tur niin, sum sen tur hi Rs. 618,36,000 niin, NABARD share chu  Rs. Nuai 398,14,000 a ni a, Bana Kaih share chu Rs. Nuai 93,97,000 a nih thu a sawi bawk. Project hmalakna tur atan khaw 7 thlan niin, Hualtu, Hmuntha, Khawbel, Sialsir, Serchhip, Chhiahtlang leh Thenzawl an ni a, Thlai chin tura an thlan te chu Tung leh Chhawhchhi emaw Bekang chin kawp tur niin, Ser (Lemon) leh Sawhthing emaw Behliang dal (Arhar) chin kawp tur a ni a, Litchi leh Lakhuhthei te chin kawp tur a ni dawn bawk a ni. He project hnuai tanpuina dawng tur hian mi 400 an thlang a. Heng bakah hian Handloom and Tailoring Sector awm bawkin, hetah hian mi 100 thlan an ni bawk a ni.

Pu Lalrokunga Chhakchhuak, Dy. General Manager, NABARD chuan thu sawiin Serchhip a kuthnathawktute chu he project ah an lo lut ta sa sa a, hlawhtling ngei tura theihtawp chhuah turin a sawm a. Taimakna lo chuan hlawhtlinna a awm lova, he project a hlawhtlin nan chuan kan zavaia tanrual a ngai a ni. Beneficiary ten mahni tan chauh ninlo, kan ram tan theihtawp chhuah ang u, tiin a sawm a ni.

Pi Vanramthangi, Director, Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare Department pawhin thu sawiin sawrkar chu theihtawpin a tang a, beneficiary te pawhin theihtawp lo chhuah ve turin a sawm a. Harsatna an nei a nih chuan tanpui turin department lam an inring reng a ni, a ti. Sawrkar hnathawh aiin kuthnathawh hi a hlawk zawk a ni tih thangtharten an lo hriat theih nan theihtawp chhuah tura chahin, ram leilung tha tak Pathianin min pek hi hmang tangkai a, a rah sengtu ni theuh turin duhsakna a hlan a ni

DC Pu Paul L Khuma pawhin thusawiin he project avang hian kut hnathawktute thar chhuah hi lo pung sela, hlawhtlinna sawi tham nei theuh turin a duhsakna a hlan a. Department hotute pawhin an beneficiary te an hnathawhna hmunah enpui fo thin ni sela, chu chuan rah tha a chhuah ngei a beiseia thu a sawi a ni.

He hun hun hi Pu Gregory Malsawmkima, Dy. Project Director, ATMA chuan a kaihruai a. He Project hnuaia khaw hrang hrang atanga tanpuina dawng turte an tel a ni.

title: Media & Communication Conference ah Mizoram atangin Officer te tel; Enumeration Form Digitisation ah Mizoramin hma a hruai
content:
981/2026-2027

Delhi, 12th June, 2026:Ni khat awh Election Commision of India (ECI) Media & Communication Conference, India International Institute of Democracy and Election Management (IIIDEM), New Delhi ah Joint CEO Pi Ethel Rothangpuii hoin Mizoram State leh District Media Nodal Officers te an tel.

Special Intensive Revision (SIR) chu India ram State 16 leh UT 3-ah kalpui mek a ni a. Enumeration Phase a awm mek state te zingah Mizoram chuan Digitisation ah hma hruaiin 68.05% zawh tawh a ni a. Anmahni hnaih bertu Manipur chuan 27.11% zo tawhin pathumna Odisha chuan 17.58% an zo tawh a ni.

He Conference hi zing dar 8:45 ah tanin tlai dar 6 thleng neih a ni a. Director General (Media) Pu Ashish Goyal chuan thu sawiin India ram pumpuia election felfai kalpui tura media pawimawhzia leh, mipuiten election ah rinna an nghah theihna tura media officer te pawimawhna a sawi a. Hemi hnu hian Director General (IT) Dr Seema Khanna leh ECI Media Division hotute - Pu Apurva Kumar Singh, Deputy Director; Pu P Pawan, Deputy Director; Pi Gouri S, Assistant Director ten presentation an nei a. Awareness campaign neih dan te, fake news (thu dik lo thehdarh) do let dan te leh pawimawh dangte sawiin thlalak leh video hmangin kalkhawmte an zirtir a ni.

Anni bakah hian tun hnaia SIR neih tawhna state Rajasthan, Kerala, Tamil Nadu leh West Bengal atang tein Media Nodal Officer te hmalak dan ngaihthlak a ni a. SIR an lo kalpui tawh dan sawiin an thil dawn leh harsatna an tawh thenkhat atanga mipui zirtirna leh SIR chungchang thehdarhna kawnga thil tha an hmuhchhuah te, thalaite chawhphur nana Electoral Literacy Club (ELC) an hman tangkai dan te an sawi a. Booth Level Officer, Booth Level Agent, Polling Agent leh Counting Agent te pawimawhna tar lanna lemchan tawi (skit) thlir ho niin, sawi hona hun hman a ni bawk.

Chawhnu lamah kharna inkhawm neih niin Chief Election Commissioner Pu Gyanesh Kumar, Election Commissioner Dr Sukhbir Singh Sandhu leh Election Commissioner Dr Vivek Joshi ten an hmanpui a. Deputy Director Pu Apurva Kumar Singh chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Mizoram State aiawh hian State Media Nodal Officer Pi Lalnunmawii, State Social Media Nodal Officer Pi F Lalnisai bakah District Media Nodal Officer leh Assistant Nodal Officer te an tel a ni.

title: Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga’n Serkhan Police Outpost hawng; Mualkhang Gas Bottling Plant tlawh
content:
980/2026-2027

Dated Serkhan, the 12th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Home Department changtu Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Serkhan khawtlang leh a chhehvel tana hmasawnna pawimawh tak tur Serkhan Police Outpost chu khuallian niin a hawng.

Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Serkhan Police Outpost-a hawnnaah hian khawtlang ralmuanna leh mipuite himna tura hmalakna pawimawh tak a nih tur thu a sawi a. Thawktu indaih lohna nasa tak karah Serkhan Police Outpost hawn theiha buatsaih a nih thu a sawi. Kum 2025 kha Mizoram Police 'Fitness' a hmasawnna beihpui thlak kum kalpui a nih hnuah kumin kum 2026 hi 'Discipline' tha kenkawh kum atan kan hmang mek a, hmasawnna awm tur chuan inhriatthiamna kan paih bo hret hret a tul a ni, a ti. Police hna kalpui danah Home Minister chuan dik tak leh langtlang taka kalpui a nih thu tarlangin, hriselna ngaih pawimawh zual zel a nih tur thu a sawi.

Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Police Outpost chu dan leh thupek kengkawhtu, Police te leh khawtlang mipuite indawrtawnna hmun pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi a. Thawktute pawh mipui thlamuan thei turin hawihhawm tak leh inpekna thuk tak nen he Outpost hi enkawl turin a fuih bawk a ni.

Home Minister chuan tlawmngai pawl leh Police te thawh hona tha tak avangin Mizoram hmun hrang hrangah hlawhtling takin ruihhlo do kalpui thin a nih thu leh dan lova kuhva ro tawlh rukna do kawngahte hma lak a nih thu a sawi a. Heng hmalakna tichak lehzual tur hian Serkhan Police Outpost hi hmanraw tangkai tak a nih a beisei thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Pu H. Ramthlengliana, IGP chuan Serkhawn Outpost chungchang report pein, kum 2020 December khan Outpost din dilna hi thehluh a nih thu a sawi a. January ni 14, 2021 khan SP Kolasib chuan zirchianna uluk taka a neih hnuin, Serkhan Police Outpost din a tul zia leh a tangkai dan tur hrang hrang ziakin a thehlut leh a. A tul ang angte bawhzui zel niin a hmun tur ramte en fel a nih hnu ah, February 2026 khan Mizoram Sawrkar chuan Serkhan Police Outpost dinna tur Notification a tichhuak ta a ni. tun dinhmunah Serkhan Police Outpost-ah hian thawktu mi 5 an awm dawn a, chhungte chu Sub Inspector 1, Head constable 2, Constable 1 leh driver 1 an ni a. Khua 6, Serkhan, Lungdai, Lungmuat, Nisapui, Bukpui leh N.Chaltlang a tuam dawn a ni.

He hunah hian DIG (NR) Pu C. Lalzahngoa chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a, Pu Lalrinpuia Varte, SP, Kolasib chuan lawmthu sawina hun a hmang bawk a ni.

Serkhan Police Outpost hawnna hun a hman zawwh hian Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Mualkhang Gas Bottling Plant-a tlawh a. Eirawngbawlna gas hnianghnar zawk neihna tura Mualkhang Gas Bottling Plant tihchangtlun mek a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Gas cylinder buk tling lo awm thin tih bo nana hmanraw tangkai a nih a beisei thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Mualkhang Gas Bottling Plant tlawhna ah hian Pu B. Lalchhanzova, Minister, Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs chuan Aizawl khawpui leh Mamit chawm thei tur Piped Natural Gas kalpui turin ruahmanna a awm mek thu a sawi a. Ruahmanna tluang taka kalpui a nih chuan kum 2027 hian Sihhmui a thlen theih beisei a nih thu a tarlang bawk a ni. Supply Minister chuan, Mualkhang Gas Bottling Plant tihchangtlun hna thawh zawh a nih chuan, nitin gas cylinder 7500 bawr vel rawn thleng ziah tawh tura beisei a nih thu sawiin, hei hian eirawngbawlna Gas hnianghnar zawk mipuiin kan neih theihna tura hmalakna a nih thu a sawi.

Pu Z Lhungdim, Dy General Manager IOCL tarlan danin Boundary hung leh retaining Wall siam hna chu za zela 90 vel thawh zawh tawh a nih bakah Land Development hna pawh za zela 75 bawr zel thawh zawh a nih thu a sawi a. Heng hnate hi July ni 21, 2026 hian thawh zawh hman beisei a nih thu a sawi. Heng hna thawh zawh a nih hnu hian Mounted Storage Vessel bun hna thawh tan tur a ni dawn a, ruahman dan chuan 900 MT dawl zo tur leh nitin LPG cylinder 7500 bawr vel a dawng zo dawn a ni. Kang mei chhuak palh a lang thelhna tur tui 6000 KL dawng thei tur tanky sak a ni dawn bawk a, thawktu, Contract Staff mi 50 bawr vel mamawh a nih tur thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Vawiin hian Home Minister hi Deputy Speaker Pu Lalfamkima, FCS&CA Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova, Adviser to CM Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA Lt. Col. Clement Lalhmingthanga, MLA Pu T. Lalhlimpuia, MLA Pu K. Laldawngliana, MLA Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua,DGPPu Sharad Agarwal,Addl. DGPPi Meenu Choudhary te bakah Home Department Joint Secretary Pu PC Lalduhthlanga leh Kolasib DC Pu H. Dolianbuaia ten an tawiawm a. Khawtlang hruaitu VC te, YMA leh MHIP member ten an tel bawk a ni.

title: KHAWZAWL DISTRICT HUAPIN VB-G RAM G CHUNGCHANGA ORIENTATION TRAINING PROGRAMME NEIH A NI
content:
979/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 12th June 2026:Vawiin khan Kumin July ni 1, 2026 atanga India ram puma hman tan tur, MGNREGA thlaktu Viksit Bharat - Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) Act, 2025 (VB-G RAM G Act) chungchang inhrilhfiahna leh inbuatsaihna hun "District Level Orientation Programme on VB-G RAM G" chu Zaingen YMA Hall, Khawzawl neih niin Khawzawl Deputy Commissioner leh District Programme Coordinator (VB G RAM G), Khawzawl District nibawk Pu K. Vanlalthiana’n khuallian niin a hmanpui.

He Orientation Training hi Pu K. Lalhmuakliana, Project Director, DRDO Khawzawl chuan a kaihruai a, KhuallianPu K. Vanlalthiana chuan thusawiin District Level Orientation Training Programme, Khawzawl District huap a buatsaih thei a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, he scheme thar hian thingtlang mipuite chawmna hna leh inhlawhna mimal tin tan a siam belh dawn rualin, khawtlang hmasawnna tlo tak a thlen theih nan mawhphurhna la thar turin kalkhawmte chu a chah a ni.

He hunah hian VB-G RAM G Act hnuaia kalphung thar, inhlawhna ni 100 atanga ni 125-a tihsan a nih dante, loneitute puala kum khata ni 60 chhung seasonal pause (hnathawh chawlh) siam a nih dante leh hna thar kalpui dan turte chipchiar taka zirtirna neih a ni a. Resource Person ten thupui hrang hrang “The Mizoram Viksit Bharat Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) Scheme, 2026 (An overview)” Pu Timothy R. Lalhmangaiha, BDO Khawzawl, “ Viksit Gram Panchayat Plan (VGPP) & Convergence” Pu James Ronghaka, Addl. Programme Officer (VB-G RAM G). Khawzawl RD Block, “Estimates, Sanctioning & Work Execution (Including Focus areas of VB-G RAM G)” Pu Lalhunchhunga, Works Manager (VB-G RAM G), Khawzawl District leh “Role of Village Gramin Rogzar Council & Village Vigilance and Monitoring Committee under VB G RAM G” Pi Lalnunsangi, Addl. Programme Officer (VB G RAM G), DRDO Khawzawl ten Power Point Presentation hmangin zirtirna hlawkthlak tak an pe a ni.

Mizoram State hi Viksit Bharat - Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) Act, 2025 (VB-G RAM G Act)  hi India ram state zingah July 1, 2026 atanga hmang tan thei tura duang chhuak hmasa ber State kan ni.  He Orientation training hi Gram Panchayat level aiawh Village Gram Rozgar Council puala buatsaih a ni a, zawhna leh chhanna hun hlimawm tak hman a niin Pu F. Malsawmtluanga, Rural Accounts Officer, DRDO Khawzawl chuan lawmthusawinain he training hi a khar a ni.

title: Lungleiah Zotlang LC leh Bunghmun West VC by-election atan draft roll tihchhuah a ni
content:
978/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 12:State Election Commission (SEC) thu chhuak angin Lunglei District-ah Zotlang Local Council (LC) leh Bunghmun Village Council (VC) te chu an member boral an awm avangin by-election buatsaih tur a ni a. Chumi atan chuan vawiin khan Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah Deputy District Election Officer, Additional Deputy Commissioner Pi Zoramdini chuan draft electoral roll a tlangzarh.

Draft electoral roll tlangzarh hi Election Officer Pi Lalhruaitluangi'n a kaihruai a. Election official-te bakah, political party ai awhte leh tlawmngai pawl ai awhte an tel.

By-election buatsaih turah hian Zotlang LC tan Pi TT Beikhaizi, Sub-Divisional Officer (Sadar) chu Municipal Electoral Registration Officer (MERO)-ah ruat niin, Bunghmun West VC tan Pu Beitlotha Nohro, District Local Administration Officer/District Transport Officer chu Electoral Registration Officer (ERO)-a ruat a ni bawk.

State Election Commission thu chhuak angin he'ng by-election neihna tur veng huam chhunga mite chuan Electoral Registration Officer hnenah vawiin, June 12 aṭanga June 24, 2026 thlengin electoral roll-a thun leh paih an dil thei ang a. Final electoral roll hi July 7, 2026-ah tihchhuah tur a ni.

Lunglei District-a LC leh VC by-election buatsaih turah hian January ni 1, 2026-a kum 18 tling chinte chu electoral roll-ah hian thun theih an ni dawn a. June 12 – 24, 2026 (claim and objection period) chhung hian MERO leh ERO kaihhruaina hnuaiah electoral roll-a thun thar te, boral tawh paih leh non-tribal paih te kalpui tur a ni.
